Changing this configuration would primarily affect the graphical user interface (GUI) or the layout of the application on different screen densities or TV devices. While it could influence the application's startup time or memory usage due to the loading of different resources, its impact is generally more related to the user interface and compatibility rather than core system performance metrics like execution time or memory consumption in a significant manner.
